articles.author: Jan Cienski, Chris Lunday
articles.title: Despite ‘chaotic communication’ Polish aide says Trump is committed to troops in Europe - politico.eu
articles.description: Top Polish official says White House U-turn reflects a “misunderstanding within the Pentagon.”
articles.content: The confused U.S. messaging dismayed Poland and European allies, but was a boon to Russian President Vladimir Putin, retired U.S. Lt. Gen. Ben Hodges said at the POLITICO Speakeasy, adding that Hegse… [+1170 chars]
